form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign sixth of 10 at Moonee Valley in the G2 Classic October 25 over 1600m, 4 len behind Salty Pearl with 57kg at $41. On debut second last of 12 at Sandown-Hillside 3yo Mdn-Sw September 10 over 1300m, 8 len behind Regal Award carrying 56kg at $14. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Looks all set for a bold run.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 4th of 12 at Pakenham 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1000m, slow going 1.4 len behind Invincible Lover with 57kg at $9. Last start ran last of 7 at Geelong 3yo F Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Farakta carrying 57kg at $19. This hard.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start 9th of 11 at Hamilton Mdn-Sw on August 2 over 1200m, on rain affected going; 14 len behind Racetothebottom carrying 53kg at $41. Returned from break sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 9 at Kyneton Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1459m, 5.5 len behind Yauson with 57kg at $151. Hard to get excited about her chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Second-up. First start 9th of 11 at Hamilton Mdn-Sw on August 2 over 1200m, on rain affected going; 14 len behind Racetothebottom carrying 53kg at $41. form.formComment: Third race start. Promising on debut sat on the pace when 2nd of 11 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on November 7 over 1200m, on heavy track; 0.5 len behind Motorsports with 56kg at $11. Went for a spell before returning 3rd of 14 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1300m, 1.2 len behind Power And The Beat with 57kg at $1.50. Well placed to win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early stages and wide without cover throughout.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 3rd of 8 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1235m, 1.1 len behind Fiveminutewarning carrying 57kg at $4.20. Previously second-up 6th of 11 at Sale 3yo Mdn-Sw on October 8 over 1427m, 4.5 len behind Roulette King with 56kg at $3.30. Likely to hold the form and play a major role again.

form.formComment: First starter by Knight Exemplar out of Lutine. Has a total of two trials prior to her debut today. Suggest monitoring the market.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, got back early 6th of 9 at Ararat 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 3 over 1200m, slow going 3.5 len behind Corro with 56kg at $6.50. Second-up 7th of 9 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1400m, on a slow track; 6 len behind She's A Jett with 57kg at $5. Must improve sharply.
